text:
is the term used by members of SEELE when the Third Impact occurred and the GeoFront returned to its original form, the Black Moon, the Lilith's Egg. The words "representing eternal time" were spoken before that. Incidentally, "red" and "earth" are one of the various theories on the origin of Adam, also known as "man of the earth," and Adam refers to a ritual to purify the body and mind. Evangelion Chronicle 01 p.24
